description: A v0.2.0 Class B artifact transitioning from CONFLICTED to SUPPORTED, where the previously contradicting source was formally retracted (with the retraction preserved as an audit record, not deleted), MUST receive SUPPORTED status.

input.claim: this execution occurred with the declared observed result

sources.retraction_reason: monitor mis-identified the wrong PID; corrected on re-scan

transition_reason.narrative: External monitor formally retracted its observation after re-scan revealed PID misidentification. Retraction preserved on src-external-monitor; observation not deleted.

why: SPEC_LOCK_v0.2.0 §2.6.1 row 3: CONFLICTED → SUPPORTED is allowed when the contradicting source is retracted AND the retraction is preserved (B2 extension). The contradicting observation is NOT deleted; it carries 'retracted': true.
